ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who holds the policy */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "age_in_days" INTEGER /* Age of the customer in days */,
  "underwriting_score" REAL /* Underwriting score assigned during application */,
  "no_of_premiums_paid" INTEGER /* Number of premiums paid by the customer */,
  "perc_premium_paid_by_cash_credit" REAL /* Percentage of the premium paid by cash or credit */,
  "premium" REAL /* Total premium amount due for the policy */,
  "renewal_status" INTEGER /* Status of the policy renewal (true/false) */,
  "residence_area_type" INTEGER /* Type of area where the customer resides */,
  "sourcing_channel" REAL /* Channel through which the policy was sourced */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was issued */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum coverage amount for the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Amount the policyholder must pay before the insurance coverage starts */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed by the customer */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "date_of_claim" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., accident, illness, theft) */,
  "claim_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was resolved */,
  "claim_resolution_details" TEXT /* Details about how the claim was resolved */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjuster who handled the claim */,
  "claim_evidence" TEXT /* Any evidence or documentation provided for the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit, bank transfer) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was due */,
  "late_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the payment was late */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Any late fee charged for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the delay */,
  "count_3_6_months_late" REAL /* Count of payments 3-6 months late */,
  "count_6_12_months_late" REAL /* Count of payments 6-12 months late */,
  "count_more_than_12_months_late" REAL /* Count of payments more than 12 months late */,
  "total_days_late" INTEGER /* Total number of days the payments were late */,
  "late_fee_total" REAL /* Total late fees charged for the policy */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_delays_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_transformed_metrics" (
  "log_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log metric entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the log metrics */,
  "log_income" REAL /* Logarithm of the income */,
  "log_age_in_days" REAL /* Logarithm of the age in days */,
  "log_underwriting_score" REAL /* Logarithm of the application underwriting score */,
  "log_no_of_premiums_paid" REAL /* Logarithm of the number of premiums paid */,
  "log_perc_premium_paid_by_cash_credit" REAL /* Logarithm of the percentage of premium paid by cash/credit */,
  "log_premium" REAL /* Logarithm of the premium amount */,
  "log_coverage_limit" REAL /* Logarithm of the coverage limit */,
  "log_deductible" REAL /* Logarithm of the deductible */,
  "log_total_days_late" REAL /* Logarithm of the total days late */,
  "log_late_fee_total" REAL /* Logarithm of the total late fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_transformed_metrics_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES insurance_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
